properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I call You faithful For the promises You’ve kept And every need You’ve met Lord I’m so grateful You were with me every step And I never will forget

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I think of how You’ve blessed me How Your hand has never let me go Never let me go

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You have been so good to me God I can’t believe How You love me What a friend You have been So good to me God I can’t believe How You love me What a friend You have been

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I call You Savior For the blood that washed me clean For the wrongs that You’ve redeemed I know You’re able And my eyes don’t have to see One more reason to believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Cause when I think of how You’ve blessed me How Your hand has never let me go Never let me go

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You have been so good to me God I can’t believe How You love me What a friend You have been

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So good to me God I can’t believe How You love me What a friend You have been
